strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research depth
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field
Title and scope (Senior Developer) below Director-level IC expectations

key_factors.factor: Limited AI expertise and shipped AI products
Engineering leadership and strategic influence at Principal/Director scope

response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, hands-on full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of experience and some entrepreneurial track record through GISCollective, plus recent exposure to AI-agent tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows little evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or the executive-level strategic influence expected of a Principal/Director-level IC advising strategic customers on cloud and AI direction.
